prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: **主角形象描述提示词：**

Shinji Ikari, male teenager, extremely handsome with delicate refined features and clear pale skin, outstanding elegant temperament. Deep blue short hair neatly styled, profound melancholic dark eyes with introspective gaze, slender lean physique, clean beautiful facial features with slightly tense worried expression. Wearing standard Japanese school uniform - dark blue blazer with white collared shirt and red tie, dark pants, black school shoes. Standing in contemplative pose with hands nervously clasped together (signature gesture), slightly hunched shoulders showing introverted nature, pensive thoughtful state. 

Full-body character design, anime manga art style, Japanese manga aesthetics, bold ink lines, halftone dot shadows, high contrast dramatic lighting, theatrical shadows. Post-apocalyptic atmosphere with subtle mechanical/technological elements in background suggesting NERV facility or Eva hangar. Character positioned center frame against pure white background, no text, no symbols, no words.

Emphasizing his genius-level intellect through sharp intelligent eyes and analytical expression, while maintaining his characteristic vulnerability and inner conflict. The lighting creates dramatic contrast highlighting his pale complexion and the psychological weight he carries as Eva pilot and key figure in humanity's survival., very handsome, very beautiful, stunning, delicate features, symmetrical face, clear skin, attractive, full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: anime
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
